artPrompt: A human volunteer woman mid-shout, mouth wide and head thrown back, throat straining, no megaphone needed as visible ripples of sound bend the warm air around her and scatter dust. One fist clenches a blank rolled placard. A single low light blazes against her face and the cords of her neck, the agitated crowd dissolving into gloom behind. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Loudest Volunteer
text:
When The Loudest Volunteer enters the battlefield, the physically loudest player at the table right now must chant a recall slogan of their choice out loud. If they do, create three 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens. If they refuse, create one, sheepishly.
The Loudest Volunteer gets +1/+0 as long as you are the loudest player at the table.
flavorText: She doesn't have a megaphone. She IS the megaphone.
